title: Spicy Tofu Bibimbap with Mushrooms & Pickled Carrot
description: Korean rice bowl topped with crispy soy-glazed tofu, sautéed kale and mushrooms, quick-pickled carrot ribbons, and a gochujang sesame drizzle.

steps.instruction: Grate ginger; fry briefly in oil, add rice with 300ml salted water; bring to boil, cover, simmer 12 minutes, then rest off heat for 12 minutes.
Drain and cube tofu; coat in soy sauce then fry in hot oil for 6–8 minutes, turning until crispy on all sides.
Peel carrot into ribbons with a peeler; toss with apple cider vinegar, a pinch of salt and sugar, and a splash of water to quick-pickle.
Mix sesame oil, gochujang paste, and remaining soy sauce in a small bowl to make the sauce.
Sauté kale, mushrooms, and minced garlic in a little oil for 4–5 minutes until softened; season.
Divide rice between bowls; top with pickled carrot, sautéed vegetables, and tofu; drizzle with gochujang sauce.
